title: Why “russell henley” is trending in US: 2,000+ searches, the facts (July 19, 2026)
description: “russell henley” is trending in US with 2,000+ searches reported by Google. The verified coverage behind the spike, from Robinhood.

sections.heading: What is trending: “russell henley”
paragraphs: “russell henley” appeared on Google Trends' Trending Now list for US (snapshot taken 2026-07-19T13:55:26+00:00 UTC). Google reports at least 2,000 searches for this term — that figure is a lower bound published in the official Trends feed, not an exact count.

sections.heading: What's behind the spike — the coverage
paragraphs: The Trends feed associates this search spike with 3 news stories from Robinhood. The headlines, exactly as published:
list: “July 16, 2026: 4th Round Head-to-Head: Uihlein vs Higa Golf Prediction Market” — Robinhood
“July 16, 2026: 4th Round Head-to-Head: Hatton vs Lee Golf Prediction Market” — Robinhood
“July 16, 2026: 4th Round Head-to-Head: Griffin vs McDonald Golf Prediction Market” — Robinhood

sections.heading: Timeline
paragraphs: The trend entry was published to the Google Trends feed at Sun, 19 Jul 2026 06:30:00 -0700. Our snapshot was taken at 2026-07-19T13:55:26+00:00 UTC and this briefing was assembled at 2026-07-19T13:55:41+00:00 UTC.

sections.heading: How to read these numbers
paragraphs: Google Trends reports approximate search volume as a lower bound (for example “20K+”). Actual volume can be significantly higher. Trending status reflects acceleration in searches, not the absolute size of a topic. For the full story behind the spike, read the cited coverage below — this briefing intentionally adds no speculation beyond the sourced facts.

faq.a: Google's Trending Now feed links the spike to coverage from Robinhood. The associated headlines are: “July 16, 2026: 4th Round Head-to-Head: Uihlein vs Higa Golf Prediction Market” (Robinhood); “July 16, 2026: 4th Round Head-to-Head: Hatton vs Lee Golf Prediction Market” (Robinhood); “July 16, 2026: 4th Round Head-to-Head: Griffin vs McDonald Golf Prediction Market” (Robinhood).

faq.q: How many people searched for “russell henley”?
faq.a: Google reports at least 2,000 searches in US as of the feed snapshot. This is a published lower bound, not an exact count.
This snapshot covers US. The same term may trend differently in other regions.
